summary: Hamburger Menu Feature Testing - Backend APIs fully working. Frontend side drawer code is implemented but hamburger icon is NOT visible due to Ionicons rendering issue in React Native Web. The TouchableOpacity component exists but the menu icon (Ionicons name='menu') is not rendering as a visible icon.

ui_bugs.issue: Ionicons 'menu' icon not rendering/visible in the header. The TouchableOpacity component exists in the DOM but the SVG icon inside is not visible. All Ionicons appear as invisible (SVGs found: []) in web view.

PUT /api/profile/password.details: Fixed crash when user has no password (Google OAuth). Now returns proper 400 error. Wrong password returns 400. Short new password returns 400.

DELETE /api/profile.details: Endpoint exists and returns 401 without auth. Deletes user, memberships, predictions, scores.

GET /api/leagues/{id}/members.details: Returns league_id, league_name, members array with user_id, username, email, role, joined_at. Tested with national league.

GET /api/news.details: Returns empty array when no news. Authenticated endpoint.

POST /api/news.details: Requires super_admin role. Regular admin gets 403 Forbidden.

GET /api/notifications.details: Returns empty array or list of notifications. Authenticated endpoint.

GET /api/auth/me.details: Returns user info including id, email, username, role, language.

hamburger_button_visible.details: Button component exists in code but icon not visible in UI. Ionicons not rendering as SVG in web view.

side_drawer_opening.details: Cannot test - hamburger button not clickable due to icon visibility issue.

menu_pages_code_review.details: All menu pages exist: profile-edit.tsx, language.tsx, my-leagues.tsx, members.tsx, rules.tsx, invites.tsx, news.tsx, notifications.tsx. All have proper data-testid attributes.

code_fix_applied.fix: Added check for empty password (Google OAuth users) in change_password endpoint to prevent ValueError: Invalid salt crash

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Ionicons rendering in home.tsx hamburger button - icons show as invisible unicode characters instead of SVG. The Ionicons font/SVG is not loading correctly in React Native Web.
Verify Ionicons package is properly configured in babel.config.js or metro.config.js for web builds
Consider using react-native-vector-icons web configuration or alternative icon approach
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API implementations are correct and complete
Frontend code for SideMenu and all menu pages is properly implemented with correct testID attributes
Root cause of hamburger visibility: Ionicons library icons not rendering in Expo web - this affects ALL icons in the app (check if other screens have same issue)

success_rate.frontend: 40% (code review passed, UI testing blocked by icon issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for hamburger menu features all working. Frontend has a critical bug where Ionicons are not rendering/visible in React Native Web build. The hamburger menu button exists in DOM but the icon is invisible. Once icon visibility is fixed, the side drawer should open and all menu navigation should work as the code is correctly implemented.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Ionicons not visible in React Native Web
reproduction_steps: 2. Observe home page header - no hamburger icon visible
3. Inspect DOM - SVG elements count is 0
4. Unicode characters like \uf4a3 visible in text content (font fallback)
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Ionicons library requires specific web configuration for Expo Web. The icon font may not be loading or SVG assets are not bundled correctly.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Check Ionicons web setup, possibly add web-specific configuration or use @expo/vector-icons web build
